response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced and skilled developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and extensive experience may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level role. His technical skills match many of the requirements, but the role's focus on renewable energy/construction tech and on-site presence may require further assessment of his fit and expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, aligning well with the role's technical requirements.
Proven track record of building scalable platforms and open-source projects, demonstrating strong architectural and problem-solving skills.
Experience with Kubernetes, AWS, and DevOps practices, which are valuable for the role's infrastructure needs.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, which may lead to misaligned expectations or shorter tenure.
Limited explicit experience in renewable energy or construction technology domains, which are central to the role.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current senior-level flexibility or remote work preferences.
